channel.title: jpcite Announcements
channel.description: Release notes, dataset ingests, and major migrations for jpcite (operated by Bookyou Inc.). A unified REST API and MCP server covering Japanese subsidies, loans, tax measures, certifications, laws, court decisions, bids, and qualified-invoice registrants.

item.title: v0.3.0 released — extended dataset + static dataset tools complete (8.29 GB unified DB)
item.description: Shipped 2026-04-25. Expanded MCP coverage and structured-data coverage; entities increased from 424,054 to 503,930 and facts from 5.26M to 6.12M.

item.title: Metadata tools — four universal MCP tools added
item.description: Four universal tools for annotations, validation, and provenance lookup are now exposed over both REST and MCP. The release strengthens cross-reference coverage across public company and program data.

item.title: Static dataset tools — 8 static taxonomies and 36-kyotei template
item.description: Static taxonomies and example-profile lookup tools were added. The 36-kyotei template remains outside general availability until review is complete.

item.title: Unified Data Foundation Update
item.description: jpcite updated its data foundation so public programs, companies, laws, and related records can be referenced together. The public API contract and source-linked responses are unchanged.

item.title: Qualified-invoice registrants delta added (PDL v1.0, 13,801 rows)
item.description: Imported the National Tax Agency qualified-invoice issuer publication site as invoice_registrants under PDL v1.0 (13,801 rows, with source attribution and edit notes). The 4M-row monthly full bulk is scheduled for a later update. Downstream redistribution via the ¥3/req API is licensed under PDL v1.0.
